common.appIntroMessage: Stay connected to school events, volunteer opportunities, and news — all in one place.

events.title: School Events
events.description: Upcoming events for our school community
events.noEvents: No upcoming events. Check back soon!

pta.title: Parent Teacher Association
pta.overview: Our PTA brings together parents, teachers, and community members to support our school.
pta.boardDescription: Meet the volunteers running our PTA this year.
pta.meetingsDescription: PTA meetings are open to all parents and guardians.
pta.meetingsNoSchedule: Meeting schedule will be posted soon.
pta.meetingsArchive: Past meeting minutes are archived and available on request from the PTA secretary.
pta.committeesDescription: Our PTA committees focus on specific areas to support our school community. Join a committee that matches your interests.
pta.newslettersDescription: Stay up to date with our monthly PTA newsletters.
pta.newslettersSignup: Subscribe to get newsletters by email.
pta.enrichmentDescription: PTA-funded programs that give every student access to arts, science, and more — beyond what the district provides.
pta.enrichmentFundedBy: Funded by your Annual Fund and Gala donations.
pta.enrichmentTotalBody: Every dollar comes from family donations. No taxpayer money funds these programs — they exist because families invest in their children's education.

volunteer.title: Volunteer With Us
volunteer.description: Every parent's time matters. Find a role that fits your schedule.
volunteer.noRoles: No open volunteer roles right now.

fundraising.title: Support Our School
fundraising.description: Your donation directly funds programs for our students.
fundraising.whereItGoesBody: Every dollar you give stays at our school. Your contribution funds programs the district doesn't pay for: classroom supplies, music instruments, science kits, field trip scholarships, and more. Our PTA is a registered 501(c)(3) — your gift is tax-deductible.
fundraising.employerMatchBody: Many employers will match your gift dollar-for-dollar. Email us at the address below if you'd like help with the matching paperwork.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with our school community.

lunch.title: Lunch Menu
lunch.description: Weekly menu, allergies, and free/reduced lunch information.
lunch.freeReducedDescription: All students qualify regardless of family income. Ask the office for details.
lunch.noMenu: No menu posted yet. Check back soon.

transportation.title: Transportation
transportation.description: Bus routes, schedules, and family carpool resources.
transportation.noRoutes: Bus routes will be posted before the school year begins.

community.title: Community Board
community.description: Classifieds, carpool offers, skill share, and local businesses that support our school.
community.noListings: No listings yet. Check back soon.

classroom.title: Classroom Pages
classroom.description: Meet our teachers and see what their classrooms need.
classroom.subject: Subject
classroom.noTeachers: Teacher pages will be added soon.

resources.title: Community Resources
resources.callToAction: Resources for food, housing, health, legal help, and mental health support.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Our public budget, fund allocation, and year-over-year spending.
transparency.noBudgets: Budget information will be published soon.

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
